title: First 1500 Improvement Plan
summary: A compact course path for a 1500-rated player focused on tactics, opening stability, practical endgames, and better game review.

modules.title: Stop the avoidable blunders
modules.summary: Build a forcing-move and blunder-check routine.

modules.title: Reach playable middlegames
modules.summary: Create a narrow repertoire and learn the plans after the opening.

modules.title: Win and save practical endings
modules.summary: Learn king activity, opposition, rook-pawn ideas, and basic rook endings.

entryCriteria: User has imported at least 20 games or chooses sample mode.
completionCriteria: Review at least 10 own games using the critical moment template.
